note: All registry/describe/health compliance is now enforced and automated. All core agents, adapters, and plugins are registry-driven and Capability-compliant. See README and ROADMAP for current state and best practices. The file .nootropic-cache/backlog-summary.json is now auto-generated from this file by scripts/generateBacklogSummary.ts for LLM/agent workflows and automation.

backlog.definitionOfDone: All scripts have --help/--json, standardized error handling/output, are referenced in docs, and pass CI checks.
reviewHooks: LLM/AI review of script discoverability monthly
promptExamples: List all scripts missing --help or --json flags.
Show usage and troubleshooting for generateDocsFromDescribe script.
backlog.description: EPIC: CLI/Script Standardization & Discoverability. Standardize all automation scripts for CLI/flag support (--help, --json), error handling, output, and documentation. Extract reusable CLI helpers/utilities. Ensure all scripts are discoverable, documented, and referenced in CI/CD and onboarding docs. Add LLM/AI usage hints to script docs.

subtasks.description: Expand describe registry documentation to explain its purpose, usage, and how to add new capabilities. Ensure all new/planned features are discoverable via the registry and onboarding.
subtasks.note: Planned: Add onboarding and docs for describe registry, including experimental/planned utilities.

subtasks.description: Draft or auto-generate missing documentation for planned features in docs/capabilities/. Ensure at least a placeholder doc exists for each planned feature, and update as code is implemented.
subtasks.note: Planned: Use docManifest and backlog to track and generate missing docs.

subtasks.description: Update onboarding documentation to reference all scripts, CLI usage, and registry-driven discoverability. Add LLM/AI usage hints and examples to all relevant docs and script outputs.
subtasks.note: Planned: Ensure onboarding is always up to date with CLI and registry changes.

subtasks.description: Cross-check the backlog, doc manifest, and code for any drift or missing references. Backlog any new gaps or technical debt discovered during this process.
subtasks.note: Planned: Regularly review for drift and backlog new issues as needed.

subtasks.description: Implement self-auditing and self-healing hooks in scripts: emit events/logs if non-standard usage, missing flags, or output drift is detected; attempt auto-fix for minor issues and emit rationale.
subtasks.note: Scripts should proactively suggest or auto-fix issues and backlog improvement opportunities.

subtasks.description: Ensure all scripts output LLM/AI-usable hints, JSON schemas, usage examples, and rationale in output when --json is specified.
subtasks.note: Enhance LLM/AI discoverability and self-documentation for all automation scripts.

backlog.progress: 20% - context and quality modularization complete, plugin ecosystem in progress
backlog.definitionOfDone: Codebase is modular, DRY/YAGNI-aligned, all utilities are registry/describe compliant, docs and onboarding are up to date.
reviewHooks: LLM/AI compliance check after major refactors
promptExamples: List all utilities not yet registry/describe compliant.
Show onboarding steps for new plugin integration.
backlog.description: EPIC: Codebase Refactor for DRY/YAGNI-Aligned Backlog. Refactor the codebase to match the new unified backlog structure, modularize utilities, enforce compliance, and update documentation. This is the next top priority for maintainability and clarity.

subtasks.description: Expand plugin/adapter ecosystem with CLI scaffolding, test harness, rating/review/social memory, and marketplace/discovery UI.
subtasks.note: Backend selection and feedback loop support in CLI/agents. UI/CLI integration pending.

subtasks.description: Implement rating, review, and social memory features for plugins/adapters in the registry and planned marketplace UI. Reference: pluginRegistry.ts, event bus, docs/pluginRegistryGuide.md.
subtasks.note: Backend selection and feedback loop support in CLI/agents. UI/CLI integration pending.

subtasks.description: Scaffold marketplace/discovery UI (CLI/web) for plugin/adapter discovery, rating, and review. Reference: pluginRegistry.ts, registry APIs, docs/pluginRegistryGuide.md.
subtasks.note: Integrate with pluginFeedback API for rating, review, and social memory. Backend and docs are complete; only UI/CLI integration is pending.

subtasks.description: Keep all compliance, secret scanning, and CI/CD logic in .github/workflows/, utils/security/, and scripts/. Ensure all sensitive data is managed via new secrets managers and compliance reporting is automated. Reference: .github/workflows/, utils/security/, scripts/

Update onboarding, automation, and feature table docs in README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, and docs/. Ensure all new/changed features are reflected in the canonical feature table and describe registry. Reference: README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, docs/

backlog.progress: 60% - LLM adapters and hybrid retrieval implemented, advanced evaluation and docs in progress
backlog.definitionOfDone: Advanced context/memory management, semantic search, and RAG pipelines are implemented, tested, and documented, with pluggable adapters and evaluation frameworks integrated.
backlog.description: Implement advanced context/memory management, semantic search, and RAG pipelines with hybrid retrieval, chunking, and feedback. Integrate with embedding providers and event logs.

subtasks.description: Automated, event-driven context/memory pruning, archiving, tiering, restoration.
Pluggable embedding models, event replay, analytics dashboards.
Scaffold RAGPipeline utility for hybrid retrieval, chunking, reranking, feedback.
Integrate RAG evaluation frameworks (RAGAS, RaLLe, ARES, TruLens).
Advanced chunking, summarization, vector retrieval for context handoff.
Expand utilities for RAG, feedback, mutation/self-healing.
Implement RAG evaluation using RAGAS, ARES, TruLens for retrieval and grounding quality.

Integrate HuggingFaceLLMAdapter for text generation and embeddings. Plug into ChunkingUtility, HybridRetrievalUtility, RerankUtility, and shimiMemory. Reference: https://huggingface.co/docs/api-inference/index
subtasks.note: Runtime selection and stubs in all agents/utilities. Integration points in place.

subtasks.description: Integrate OpenRouterLLMAdapter for multi-provider LLM routing. Plug into context utilities and memory. Reference: https://openrouter.ai/docs
subtasks.note: Runtime selection and stubs in all agents/utilities. Integration points in place.

subtasks.description: Integrate OllamaLLMAdapter for local LLM inference. Plug into context utilities and memory. Reference: https://github.com/jmorganca/ollama
subtasks.note: Runtime selection and stubs in all agents/utilities. Integration points in place.

subtasks.description: Add/expand test coverage for all LLM adapters and their integration with context utilities.
subtasks.note: Stubs and integration points in place. Full coverage and docs pending.

subtasks.description: Document usage, configuration, and registry/describe/health compliance for all LLM adapters in README.md, docs/, and onboarding materials.
subtasks.note: Stubs and integration points in place. Full coverage and docs pending.

subtasks.description: Add real-world integration tests for HuggingFaceLLMAdapter, OpenRouterLLMAdapter, and OllamaLLMAdapter with all context utilities (ChunkingUtility, HybridRetrievalUtility, RerankUtility, ShimiMemory). Cover edge cases and error handling.
subtasks.note: Stubs and integration points in place. Full coverage and docs pending.

subtasks.description: Document usage, configuration, and registry/describe/health compliance for all LLM adapters in README.md, docs/, and onboarding materials. Include code samples and best practices.
subtasks.note: Stubs and integration points in place. Full coverage and docs pending.

subtasks.description: Enhance ChunkingUtility with LLM-based chunk scoring and filtering. Integrate with all LLM adapters and allow threshold configuration.
Enhance HybridRetrievalUtility with advanced fusion logic, fallback strategies, and explainability. Integrate with all LLM adapters and vector/BM25 backends.
Enhance feedback and review moderation with LLM-powered summarization, abuse detection, and explainability dashboards. Integrate with FeedbackAgent and SHIMI memory.
subtasks.note: Stubs and integration points in place. Full coverage and docs pending.

subtasks.description: Expand integration tests for LLM adapters and context utilities: repeatability/alignment, responsibility (bias/toxicity/fairness), performance/cost, edge cases, and CI/CD robustness. Reference 2024 best practices.
Implement repeatability/alignment tests: run same input multiple times, aggregate results, and check for consistency. Use seed/multi-choice where supported.
Add responsibility tests for bias, toxicity, and fairness. Integrate open-source tools or stubs. Document results and remediation.
Log and monitor latency, token usage, and cost for each adapter. Add performance assertions and CI/CD reporting.
Integrate feedback loop and observability: capture user/system feedback, log errors, and expose metrics for monitoring and improvement.

backlog.note: All three LLM adapters (HuggingFace, OpenRouter, Ollama) now have real API implementations, error handling, and registry/describe/health compliance. Next: expand integration tests and advanced enhancements.

backlog.description: Unify quality tools (Semgrep, SonarQube), add LLM-powered auto-fix, cross-tool deduplication, and feedback/memories APIs. Expand test coverage.

subtasks.description: Enhance SonarQube APIs, unify feedback/memories, add LLM-powered triage.
Implement LLM-powered auto-fix for SonarQube findings.
Integrate cross-tool deduplication and feedback/memories.
Add tests for quality tool integration and feedback/memories APIs.
Expand test coverage for LLM-powered auto-fix and feedback/memories APIs (e.g., explainSemgrepFinding, suggestSemgrepFix, autoFixSemgrepFinding, listAllSastMemories, etc.).
Implement nightly fine-tuning and telemetry-driven adaptation workflows for continuous learning.
Ingest developer corrections and feedback as supervised signals for continual model improvement.

backlog.description: Automate security, compliance, and CI/CD workflows. Enforce secret scanning, provenance, and doc/code sync with badges and reporting.

subtasks.description: Automated compliance/audit reporting, secret scanning, provenance tracking.
Integrate Vault/ArgoCD/Kaniko for secure CI/CD and secrets management.
Optimize CI/CD for monorepo with path filters, matrix builds, caching.
Add badges for doc/code sync, API docs, schema validation.

backlog.description: Automate and update documentation, onboarding, and feature tables. Ensure all automation and workflows are documented and discoverable.

subtasks.description: Update CONTRIBUTING.md and README.md for automation, scripts, onboarding.
Update README/docs to include canonical feature table and describe registry.

backlog.description: Refactor and modularize all utilities and helpers by domain (context, event, security, testing, describe, plugin, feedback). Ensure Capability/describe compliance and registry discoverability.

subtasks.description: Context helpers: chunking, summarization, tiering, token-budget negotiation.
Event helpers: schema validation, replay, analytics, tracing.
Security helpers: secret scanning, guardrails, audit logging.
Testing helpers: mutation, contract/integration, coverage.
Describe/registry aggregation, validation, doc/spec generation.
Plugin/adapter scaffolding, CLI, templates.
Feedback/memory helpers: submission, retrieval, suggestion routing.
Refactor utility classes for Capability/describe compliance.

subtasks.note: llama.cpp, NV-Embed-v2, vector store, quantization, and cloud fallback integration in progress. See README.md for stack summary.

subtasks.description: Benchmark and evaluate upgraded utilities (ChunkingUtility, HybridRetrievalUtility, RerankUtility, ShimiMemory) for accuracy, speed, and extensibility. Reference best practices and extensibility.
subtasks.note: Next: Add automated tests and benchmarks for all advanced utilities.

subtasks.description: Standardise dynamic import() logic with Node.js's package resolution rules. Implementation: Use Node.js's import() and package resolution rules. Fallback to CommonJS if ESM fails.
Integrate the update-notifier npm module for unobtrusive CLI updates. Implementation: Use update-notifier for CLI.
Store static-analysis results in a vector store for similarity-based deduplication. Implementation: Encode findings as embeddings. Deduplicate via nearest-neighbor search, cluster recurring issues.
Utilise the CRITIC framework for automated plugin review. Implementation: Route plugin outputs through a CRITIC LLM for scoring/summarization. Store results in feedback memory.
Standardise on HashiCorp Vault for secure, dynamic secret leasing. Implementation: Use HashiCorp Vault for encrypted storage, dynamic credentials, and audit logging.

Integrate the open-source Python BM25S library (https://github.com/xhluca/bm25s) via a Node.js child_process adapter for the SparseRetriever in HybridRetrievalUtility. Ensure robust error handling, streaming, and test coverage.
Evaluate and optionally integrate a pure JS BM25 implementation for the SparseRetriever. Compare performance and maintainability with the Python BM25S adapter.

Integrate vectorstore (https://github.com/kyr0/vectorstore) for local, cost-free vector search in the DenseRetriever. Ensure compatibility with existing embedding models and registry-driven configuration.
Implement robust test coverage for all hybrid retrieval adapters (BM25S, vectorstore, etc.), including error cases and performance benchmarks.
Document usage, configuration, and registry/describe/health compliance for all hybrid retrieval adapters in docs and feature tables. Ensure LLM/AI-friendly discoverability.
Scaffold event helpers: event bus, schema validation, replay, analytics, and tracing. Ensure modularity and registry/describe compliance.
Scaffold security helpers: secret scanning, guardrails, audit logging, and compliance hooks. Ensure modularity and registry/describe compliance.

backlog.progress: 10% - orchestration and ensemble patterns scaffolded, advanced agent features planned
backlog.definitionOfDone: All advanced agent patterns (Toolformer, Swarm, MoE, CRITIC, Stryker, LIME/SHAP, Pix2Code, Whisper, etc.) are implemented, tested, and documented.
backlog.description: EPIC: Consolidated advanced agent enhancements (Toolformer, Swarm, MoE, CRITIC, Stryker, LIME/SHAP, Pix2Code, Whisper, etc.). Groups orchestration, ensemble, feedback/self-critique, mutation/fuzzing, explainability, multimodal, and voice coding into sub-epics for efficient implementation.

subtasks.description: OrchestratorAgent, Swarm, multi-agent orchestration, failure/retry/escalation.
EnsembleAgent, MoE, DeepSeek-V3, voting/gating, registry-driven ensemble.
FeedbackAgent, CRITIC self-critique, static analysis feedback, SAST/SHIMI integration.
MutationAgent, Stryker mutation testing, property-based fuzzing, rollback.
ExplainabilityAgent, LIME/SHAP, code rationale/explanation.
MultimodalAgent, Pix2Code, Flame-Code-VLM, UI-to-code translation.
VibeCodingAgent, Whisper, real-time voice-to-code.

EnsembleAgent: Advanced Multi-LM Ensemble (EnsLLM) with candidate generation from diverse LLMs, structured voting (syntactic similarity via CodeBLEU, behavioral tests via CrossHair), meta-LLM adjudication for borderline cases, self-debugging loop (LEDEX), and efficiency-aware gating (SPIO) for local/cloud routing. References: arXiv:2503.15838v1, LEDEX, SPIO, CodeBLEU, CrossHair.

MultimodalAgent: Integrate Flame-Waterfall Vision-Code Model (Flame-Waterfall-7B) for UI mockup-to-React, structured data synthesis with waterfall pipeline, diagram parsing via CLIP+DSL, and multimodal fusion with GPT-4V/Qwen-VL fallback. References: Flame-Waterfall-7B, DeepSeek-Coder-7B, SigLIP, CLIP, GPT-4V, Qwen-VL.

VibeCodingAgent: Whisper-driven transcription (whisper.cpp, Metal), voice-to-code with Serenade, error-log ingestion and LLM-driven repair, conversational debugging UI for inline chat and patching. References: Whisper, Serenade, error-analysis LLMs.

HumanInTheLoopAgent: Governance-driven HITL with low-confidence flagging, active learning loops for feedback-driven fine-tuning, and reciprocal human-machine learning (RHML) for adaptive agent/human collaboration. References: HITL best practices, RHML.

MemoryAgent: R3Mem reversible compression for long-context retention, HEMA hippocampus-inspired memory, LangGraph retrieval backends, and HIRO branch-pruning queries for efficient, lossless context management. References: R3Mem, HEMA, LangGraph, HIRO.

SupervisorAgent: Agentic AI self-healing with streaming metrics and anomaly detection (isolation forest), multi-agent fault recovery (MAS+AI), enforcement agents for audit/intervention, and pattern-based anomaly escalation. References: MAS, enforcement agents, anomaly detection, self-healing systems.

backlog.note: Consolidated from individual advanced agent enhancement tasks for clarity and batch implementation. See references in original subtasks.

backlog.progress: 10% - chunking and retrieval utilities scaffolded, advanced features planned
backlog.definitionOfDone: All advanced utility upgrades (ChunkRAG, bi-encoder/cross-encoder, hybrid retrieval, MemTree, Vault, etc.) are implemented, tested, and documented.
backlog.description: EPIC: Consolidated advanced utility upgrades (ChunkRAG, bi-encoder/cross-encoder, hybrid retrieval, MemTree, dynamic import, update-notifier, vectorstore dedup, plugin feedback, Vault). Groups context/RAG, retrieval/rerank, memory, infra/tooling, and security into sub-epics for efficient implementation.

subtasks.description: ChunkingUtility (ChunkRAG), LLM-driven chunk filtering, semantic passage evaluation.
HybridRetrievalUtility (BM25+DPR), RerankUtility (bi-encoder/cross-encoder), fallback and fusion strategies.
ShimiMemory (MemTree), dynamic tree memory, summarization/compression, CRDT merge.
adapterUtils (dynamic import), updateNotifier (CLI updates), pluginFeedback (CRITIC review).
secretsManager (Vault), sastMemories (vectorstore deduplication).

backlog.note: Consolidated from individual advanced utility upgrade tasks for clarity and batch implementation. See references in original subtasks.

backlog.description: Integrate LLM/embedding backend for semantic similarity and merging in SHIMI memory.
Evaluate SHIMI memory retrieval and sync against vector-based baseline (accuracy, speed, explainability).
backlog.note: SHIMI is integrated, tested, and ready for benchmarking against vector-based baselines.

backlog.description: Benchmark SHIMI memory in real-world agent workflows and compare with vector-based and RAG baselines.
Implement advanced event replay and debugging for rationale/mutation/self-healing events. Support distributed event sourcing and time-travel debugging.

Add/expand integration tests and update documentation for advanced ReasoningLoopUtility features (SCoT, LLM-driven explanation/repair, robust backtracking, feedback integration). Reference: capabilities/ReasoningLoopUtility.ts, tests/.

Implement real hybrid retrieval (vector + keyword), adaptive semantic chunking, LLM-based reranking, and feedback-driven improvement in RAGPipelineUtility. Integrate with embedding providers and semantic index. Emit events for all major actions.

Add end-to-end tests for orchestrated agent workflows (OrchestratorAgent/EnsembleAgent using RAGPipelineUtility, ReasoningLoopUtility, and FeedbackAgent). Ensure all events are emitted and aggregated correctly.
Ensure all describe(), health(), registry, and documentation are up to date after major changes to RAGPipelineUtility, ReasoningLoopUtility, FeedbackAgent, and OrchestratorAgent.
Implement real semantic chunking (embedding-based) in ChunkingUtility. Integrate with embedding providers and allow threshold configuration.
Implement real agentic chunking (task-driven, LLM/embedding-based) in ChunkingUtility. Support task-specific segmentation and metadata.
Add/expand tests for all chunking strategies in ChunkingUtility. Ensure robust coverage and edge cases.
Integrate ChunkingUtility into RAGPipelineUtility. Allow dynamic selection of chunking strategy and update docs/describe registry.
Implement real embedding-based reranker in RerankUtility. Integrate with embedding providers and scoring.
Implement real LLM-based reranker in RerankUtility. Integrate with LLM providers for scoring.
Implement real cross-encoder reranker in RerankUtility. Integrate with cross-encoder models for scoring.
Implement real MMR/diversity reranker in RerankUtility. Integrate with diversity scoring and deduplication.
Add/expand tests for all rerank strategies in RerankUtility. Ensure robust coverage and edge cases.
Integrate RerankUtility into RAGPipelineUtility. Allow dynamic selection of rerank strategy and update docs/describe registry.
Add/expand contract and integration tests for registry/describe/health compliance across all utilities, agents, and plugins.
Automate describe registry generation and CI enforcement for registry/describe/health compliance.
Review and update all agent and plugin describe() outputs for completeness and LLM/AI-friendliness.
Add/expand onboarding documentation for registry-driven, modular architecture and barrel file usage.
Integrate open-source LLM APIs for chunk scoring, semantic search, and memory summarization (e.g., HuggingFace, OpenRouter, local models).
Implement BM25 and DPR adapters for HybridRetrievalUtility (prefer Node.js or Python bridge, open source only).
Add/expand test coverage for ChunkingUtility, HybridRetrievalUtility, RerankUtility, and MemTree/SHIMI memory. Include edge cases and integration tests.
Document usage, configuration, and feature table entries for new context utilities in README.md, docs/, and onboarding materials.

backlog.description: EPIC: Integrate NVIDIA NV-Embed-v2 as the canonical embedding model for all semantic search, retrieval, and agentic context workflows.

subtasks.description: Add CI/test coverage for embedding pipeline and integration with agentic workflows.
Add support for 4-bit GGUF/AutoGPTQ quantization for CPU/low-VRAM setups.
Document NV-Embed-v2 setup, usage, quantization, and rationale in README and BACKLOG_POLICY.

backlog.note: NV-Embed-v2 is now the default embedding model for all semantic/agentic workflows. See README for setup and rationale.

backlog.description: EPIC: Ensure total parity between documentation, codebase, and backlog. Backlog all missing/planned docManifest sections and references. Update docs to reflect planned/in-progress status for all features.

subtasks.description: Backlog all missing/planned docManifest sections and references as backlog items or subtasks, with status 'planned' or 'in progress'. Reference docManifest and code/doc sync check for each.
Update docManifest.json to mark missing sections as 'planned' or 'in progress' if not yet implemented. Ensure all planned features are discoverable in docs and backlog.

Update README.md, BACKLOG_POLICY.md, and CONTRIBUTING.md to reference all major features, planned implementations, and agentic/embedding upgrades. Ensure onboarding, coding standards, and CI/CD integration are up to date.

backlog.note: This epic ensures that all planned and missing features from docManifest and code/doc sync checks are tracked, discoverable, and documented.

backlog.description: Automate pruning and archiving of completed or obsolete backlog items. The system should automatically move completed/obsolete items to .nootropic-cache/backlog-archive.json, keeping the main backlog actionable and up to date. Reference scripts/pruneBacklogTodos.ts, scripts/backlogSync.ts, and scripts/generateBacklogSummary.ts.

Automate technical debt hotspot detection and prioritization. The system should automatically surface and prioritize files/modules with the highest TODO density and staleness, using LLM/AI heuristics and dependency analysis. Reference scripts/aiTriageBacklogTodos.ts and backlogInsights.ts.

Automate stale TODO detection and escalation. The system should automatically flag TODOs that have not been updated or resolved within a configurable threshold (e.g., 30 days), escalate them in the backlog, and notify maintainers. Reference scripts/backlogInsights.ts.

Integrate technical debt hotspot detection and stale TODO escalation into CI/CD: scheduled runs, PR checks, and notifications. Reference scripts/aiTriageBacklogTodos.ts, scripts/backlogInsights.ts, and docs. Mark as 'planned'.

Integrate stale TODO escalation with GitHub IssueOps/notification: auto-create or update issues for stale TODOs, notify maintainers, and escalate as needed. Reference scripts/backlogInsights.ts and IssueOps workflow. Mark as 'planned'.

Automate onboarding checklist generation and enforcement: auto-generate onboarding/troubleshooting checklists from the describe registry and docs, enforce in CI/onboarding. Reference CONTRIBUTING.md and planned onboarding script. Mark as 'planned'.

Automate context/semantic graph refresh: schedule or trigger scripts/generateContextGraph.ts and scripts/generateSemanticEmbeddings.ts to keep context graphs and embeddings up to date. Mark as 'planned'.
Automate cache health reporting and manifest refresh: schedule or trigger scripts/pruneAndCompressCache.ts --refresh-manifest and report cache health in CI. Mark as 'planned'.

Automate compliance, health, and lifecycle checks for all capabilities: run scripts/validateDescribeRegistry.ts and tests/lifecycleCompliance.test.ts in CI, report results, and enforce compliance. Mark as 'planned'.

Automate IssueOps state-machine triggers for backlog/roadmap items: auto-update GitHub Issues and project boards based on backlog/roadmap changes, using scripts/backlogSync.ts and .github/workflows/issueops-state-machine.yml. Mark as 'planned'.

Add --json and --help flags to all automation scripts for LLM/agent-friendly and human usage. Reference: aiTriageBacklogTodos.ts, backlogInsights.ts, pruneBacklogTodos.ts, generateDocsFromDescribe.ts, docs-check-sync.ts, backlogSync.ts, etc.
Standardize error handling and exit codes across all automation scripts for consistency and easier troubleshooting. Reference: all scripts in scripts/ directory.

Extract common file reading/writing, JSON parsing, and error handling into a shared utility (e.g., utils/automationHelpers.ts) and use it across all automation scripts for DRYness and maintainability.
Ensure all scripts that generate outputs (e.g., insights, context graphs, compliance reports) are scheduled in CI/CD, not just manual. Reference: .github/workflows/ and scripts/ directory.
Update documentation for each automation script to include usage, flags, outputs, and troubleshooting/extension tips. Reference: README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, scripts/ directory.

Implement and document multi-agent collaboration/orchestration patterns (manager, peer, critic, feedback loops) for agentic workflows. Reference: 2025 best practices, Orq.ai, n8n, CrewAI, LangGraph, and latest research.

Automate feedback loops for performance metrics, user/agent feedback, and continuous improvement. Integrate with backlog, IssueOps, and agent memory. Reference: 2025 best practices, Orq.ai, n8n, and latest research.
Automate dynamic prioritization and sprint planning using AI/LLM insights, dependency graphs, and backlog insights. Reference: 2025 best practices, n8n, and latest research.

Automate security, compliance, and guardrail checks (escalation triggers, audit logs, privacy checks) for all agentic workflows. Reference: 2025 best practices, EU AI Act, Anthropic's constitutional AI, and latest research.

Automate human-in-the-loop escalation and review for ambiguous or high-risk actions. Integrate with IssueOps, notifications, and agent workflows. Reference: 2025 best practices, Orq.ai, n8n, and latest research.
Implement modular, memory-augmented agent patterns (short/long-term memory, context graphs) for context-aware, adaptive workflows. Reference: CrewAI, LangGraph, Orq.ai, and latest research.
Automate tool integration and orchestration (function calling, API/tool registry, dynamic tool selection) for agentic workflows. Reference: n8n, Orq.ai, and latest research.
Automate documentation and discoverability for all tools, workflows, and agents (docs-as-code, LLM/AI-friendly, introspectable). Reference: 2025 best practices, n8n, Orq.ai, and latest research.

backlog.title: Intelligent Backlog & Roadmap Automation
backlog.description: Upgrade the backlog and roadmap system to support explicit epic/thematic grouping, dependency mapping, status/ownership, LLM/AI-first metadata, automated hygiene, backlog-to-roadmap sync, contextual enhancement, change history, feedback loop, and automated suggestion/refinement. This will enable a living, actionable, and context-rich backlog always in sync with code, docs, and roadmap.

subtasks.description: Cluster all backlog items under clear, high-level epics with nested subtasks and cross-links.
Add explicit dependency fields (dependsOn, blocks) to all items.
Use richer status fields and assign owners/responsible teams.
Add LLM/AI-usable tags and machine-readable fields for priority, risk, and effort.
Automate detection of code/doc/test drift and stale items.
Auto-generate roadmap and dashboards from the backlog.
Enrich each item with links, usage, acceptance criteria, and impact notes.
Track edits and merges to backlog items for auditability.
Integrate agent/user/LLM feedback directly into backlog items.
Regularly run LLM-powered refinement to suggest merges, splits, or reprioritization.

backlog.note: This epic will modernize and future-proof backlog and roadmap management for nootropic.
